text: Who cares about grades? Summer vacation has already started!
I wish I could, but holiday is basically we catching up on English.
Worst luck ever. We sre the ones who have to deal with Julian this term.
Press the up key to look at the blackboard.
(Cici is my only and best friend.)
(She's the type to be affected by grades too, but she doesn't dwell on it.)
(I can talk to other classmates, of course. We say hi when we see each other.)
(But if I can see my dearest Cici at school every day...)
(partner with her in P.E. class and line up with her without a second thought...)
(and go home with her after school...)
(and just do homework the rest of the time...)
(Life is so blissful that I have no time to think about anything else.)
Of course! Let me play Aoi Prism!
Last time I opened a music game at home, my mom told me I might as well be playing the piano.
Maybe she just doesn't like seeing you play games.
My mom says I should study abroad in the future.
Julian is the founder of this school.
It wasn't easy to get you into his class.
(When Cici chants along, only her mouth moves.)
(It's more like a silent film performance.)
(Her mouth shapes are exaggerated, but her voice lacks the enthusiasm Julian expects.)
I want to drop this class!
Would your mom agree to that?
